sources: Google Drive (Monarch docs, decks, handoff doc, Q2 notes, FAST briefs)
data_note: No direct Slack or Gong API access — signals pulled from Drive docs that reference Slack activity and Gong call summaries embedded in meeting notes and handoff docs.

per_deal_summaries.size: 2 pilot locs (of 4–5 total) · 40 physicians · ~100 PAs · ~3,500 calls/mo · Est. MRR $2,424–$7,892
per_deal_summaries.champion: James Stilley (CEO), Deana Guy-Johnson (Clinical Manager — 10 yrs at GLOC)
per_deal_summaries.status: Signed Apr 27 — Solv's first Monarch design partner, announced at All Hands. Phase 1 (Listen & Observe, $0/60 days) is live. Deal handoff doc shared with PSC+EPD team May 1 (Brantley → William, Garrett, Caroline for account assignment). Jim's leadership team is on vacation until ~May 16, so the formal kickoff call is pending. Carli is collecting Athena 3rd-party auth credentials and a preview instance copy-down; Kennedy is handling Maya DID phone line requirements.
key_risks: Phase 1 is $0 — deal only generates margin once resolution rate hits ~35%, which is unproven in ortho
Deana was openly skeptical AI can handle GLOC's complex scheduling rules — Phase 1 must win her over to unlock Phase 2
Payments processor not confirmed — flagged as a gap in the handoff doc
per_deal_summaries.next_step: Formal kickoff call after May 16 when GLOC leadership returns; Carli to close Athena 3rd-party auth + Kennedy to confirm DID phone line before then — Owners: Carli / Kennedy

per_deal_summaries.status: Outbound deal. First demo held May 11 (yesterday) — partnership exploration deck finalized same day. GI specialty on Athena is squarely in the green ICP zone (GI + Athena = priority target per Apr 22 pipeline framework). No post-call notes or deal details found yet — deal size, champion identity, and next steps are all unknown.
key_risks: No champion or economic buyer identified yet — early signal only
No call volume, practice size, or pricing discussion data available
Demo outcome unknown — no post-call debrief found in Drive
per_deal_summaries.next_step: Debrief on May 11 demo; document champion, pain, and call volume — Owner: Brantley — Due: This week

per_deal_summaries.size: 11 locations · CA · ~17 providers · ~30+ missed calls/day · est. 20–25K calls/mo
per_deal_summaries.status: Formally paused Mar 11 — Assort Health exclusivity clause blocks all movement until their vendor contract resolves; no timeline given. Jon surfaced the blocker proactively (did not ghost), confirmed intent to return to Solv once clear. Deal was at near-signature stage in late Feb (design partner 3-phase proposal accepted in principle, DocuSign pending) before Assort surfaced. Last active check-in was Apr 7 — now 5+ weeks overdue on the every-2-week passive cadence.
key_risks: Assort exit timeline is unknown — deal could remain frozen 3–6+ more months
Jon's internal advocacy may erode the longer the pause drags
GLOC now provides Athena ortho reference — helpful context for Jon when deal resumes
per_deal_summaries.next_step: Overdue check-in with Jon on Assort exit timeline — Owner: Brantley — Due: TODAY (5+ weeks since last touch)

per_deal_summaries.size: 250+ providers · Texas · $3,500/mo base · up to 3K telemed visits · +ClearPay upsell
per_deal_summaries.champion: Dr. Baba (decision-maker — title unclear), Maria Kwok (newly added — reviewing feedback)
per_deal_summaries.status: Full end-to-end telehealth demo delivered May 5; Dr. Baba is engaged but explicitly gating on ECW integration proof ('if this doesn't integrate with ECW, let us know'). HMO/assigned-PCP billing logic is unresolved — workaround (POS 20 or $60–75 cash-pay) needs internal validation. Pricing counter is open: per-encounter hybrid model, 3–6 months free ramp, 6-month initial term (vs. 1-year), waive $2K impl fee. Danny Cavic asked May 6 for all CLS feedback compiled for Maria Kwok. Note: ECW is a gray-category EHR and this is a telehealth-origin deal — not a pure Monarch ICP, but expansion into specialties as a design partner is the stated Phase 2 intent (Kapeesh call on specialty scope not yet scheduled).
key_risks: ECW = gray ICP and requires an ECW integration build not needed for Athena/NextGen/ModMed prospects
HMO billing workaround (POS 20 or cash-pay model) needs internal validation before this deal can close cleanly
Kapeesh specialty scope call not yet scheduled — two-part deal structure is not locked
per_deal_summaries.next_step: Deliver ECW proof video (HIPAA-blurred) + ECW reference customer (multi-provider, TX preferred) — Owner: Brantley/Danny — Due: Urgent; schedule Kapeesh specialty scope call — Owner: Kapeesh — Due: TBD

per_deal_summaries.size: 4 locations · cash-constrained (3 opened simultaneously) · Atlanta/Kennesaw drag
per_deal_summaries.champion: Randy Johansen (Board member, former AFC CEO) — board-level, not operational
per_deal_summaries.status: Note: based on prior deal notes only — no dedicated Slack channel or Granola data found. Org opened 3 locations simultaneously and is cash-constrained; the Kennesaw (Atlanta) location opened for months without an MRI and is a financial drag. Randy (board) was expected to reconnect the week of Apr 28 after an internal board meeting — that window has now passed with no visible update. Pitch is ClearPay + Maya to improve cash flow without large upfront cost.
key_risks: Randy is board-level only — no day-to-day operational champion identified
Cash pressure may delay any buying decision indefinitely regardless of pitch quality
Apr 28 board reconnect window passed without visible outcome
per_deal_summaries.next_step: Confirm whether Apr 28 board reconnect happened and what came of it — Owner: Brantley/Evan — Due: TODAY

removed_from_pipeline.reason: Wants Experience/Engage only — not Maya/ClearPay. ECW integration build not justified for a single urgent ortho location. Redirected to standard Solv sales motion. Jennifer Hazelton (Dir. of Marketing, ex-PhysicianOne, former Solv user) worth preserving as a relationship.

Champion (Osvaldo, admin) was bought in, but providers are the real decision-makers and were never engaged. Multiple follow-ups since Mar 9 — consistent email opens, zero replies. Trust barrier from a prior vendor (hidden fees) was never fully cleared. Revisit only if Osvaldo re-engages post-Athena go-live.

CTO-built homegrown scheduler won't be replaced; 6–9 month runway before any real Monarch commitment. Rikin (Chief of Staff) is actively piloting a competing voice agent and was skeptical of Maya. Revisit Q4 2026 if acquisition-layer deal model gains Solv leadership traction.

leadership_table.key_notes: Signed Apr 27; Phase 1 live; formal kickoff pending May 16 leadership return.
First demo May 11; GI + Athena = green ICP; champion and deal size not yet known.
Blocked by Assort Health exclusivity since Mar 11; Jon check-in 5+ weeks overdue.
Gated on ECW proof post May 5 demo; HMO billing workaround and pricing counter both open.
Apr 28 board reconnect passed with no update; no operational champion identified.
